name: AGILENT TECHNOLOGIES, INC.
business: Agilent Technologies, Inc. is a global leader in life sciences, diagnostics and applied markets, providing application-focused solutions that include instruments, software, services and consumables for the entire laboratory workflow. The company sells to pharmaceutical, biopharmaceutical, diagnostics, clinical, academic, government, chemicals, advanced materials, food, environmental, and forensics markets.

exposures.sentence: We provide active pharmaceutical ingredients for oligo-based therapeutics as well as solutions that include reagents, instruments, software and consumables, which enable customers in the clinical and life sciences research areas to interrogate samples at the cellular and molecular level.
Our pathology solutions business is focused on product offerings for cancer diagnostics and anatomic pathology workflows.
Our genomics business includes reagents to support next-generation sequencing workflows and arrays.

In addition, we collaborate with several major pharmaceutical companies to develop new potential tissue pharmacodiagnostics, also known as companion diagnostics, which may be used to identify patients most likely to benefit from a specific targeted therapy.

Our contract development and manufacturing organization business provides equipment and expertise focused on mid to large scale production of synthesized oligonucleotide active pharmaceutical ingredients under pharmaceutical good manufacturing practices conditions for a class of drugs that utilize oligonucleotide molecules for disease therapy.
Our instruments and workflow solutions are used throughout the food production chain, including incoming inspection, new product development, quality control and assurance, and packaging.
For example, our mass spectrometer portfolio is used to analyze contaminants and residual pesticides in food.

Additionally, our products are used to support the testing for safety, quality, and compliance across the value chains of advanced materials including semiconductors, batteries, and specially engineered polymers and polymeric materials.

Additionally, our products are used to support the testing for safety, quality, and compliance across the value chains of advanced materials including semiconductors, batteries, and specially engineered polymers and polymeric materials.

The upstream petroleum exploration and refining markets use our products to analyze natural gas, crude oil composition, perform intermediate material analysis, verify and improve refining processes and ensure the overall quality of gasoline, fuels, lubricants and other products.

Our instruments, software and workflow solutions are used by the environmental market for applications such as laboratory and field analysis of regulated and unregulated chemical pollutants in air, water, soil and solid waste.

Drug testing and forensics laboratories use our instruments, software and workflow solutions for applications such as analyzing evidence associated with crime, screening athletes for performance enhancing drugs, analyzing samples for recreational drugs, or detecting and identifying biological and chemical warfare agents.

We are integrating artificial intelligence and machine learning technologies ("AI") into our business operations, products and services, while continuing to explore the opportunities that AI could bring to the company.

catalysts.sentence: We expect to substantially complete these restructuring activities by the second quarter of fiscal year 2026.
